flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Mercy College of Health Sciences fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (0.9% → 0.0%).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Mercy College of Health Sciences rose 58% between 2021 and 2024 (43.8% → 69.2%).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Mercy College of Health Sciences rose 48% between 2021 and 2024 (45.0% → 66.7%).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Mercy College of Health Sciences fell 24% between 2017 and 2020 ($19.5k → $14.7k).
